included.description: 24-hour fuel and convenience store at I-24 Exit 65 (US-68/KY-80) serving the Land Between the Lakes corridor. Listed as a small stop; no dedicated truck parking per fuel-finder directory.

included.business_name: Hometown Auto & Truck Repair and Towing
included.description: Full-service auto and truck repair shop offering 24-hour road service, towing/flatbed, and new/used tire repair for semis, diesel, and RVs in Cadiz (Trigg County), off I-24 Exit 65.

held.hold_reason: Listed at 10705 Cadiz Rd near I-24 Exit 56 with truck parking, restaurant/deli, and store, but only one reliable aggregator source (Roadnow) could be corroborated; truck parking/amenities unverified by a second independent source.
Appears in a truck stop/services directory near I-24 Exit 65, but truck parking is not confirmed by an independent source.

excluded.reason: out-of-corridor - nearest CAT Scale to Cadiz is at Oak Grove/Ft. Campbell (I-24 Exit 86/89), east of the Exit 42-65 segment; none in Trigg County.
out-of-corridor - nearest I-24 weigh/inspection facility is near Eddyville west of the segment; no weigh station in the Cadiz/Trigg County Exit 42-65 corridor per KYTC.
single-source-unverifiable for trucking - standard hotels at Exit 65 with no confirmed truck parking; do not qualify for hotels-truck-parking.
